name: flowai-beta
description: Opt-in beta capabilities not yet promoted to core. Ships the doc-anchors-validate Stop hook (SALP anchor/reference integrity check; Claude Code only) and the select-llm-model skill (task-driven LLM recommender; live-fetched leaderboard data).
